videos.description: Explore the occult world that surrounded Hitler and his inner circle. From the rituals and beliefs that fuelled Hitler's fascination with evil, to his pursuit of the Holy Grail and the Spear of Destiny, both believed to possess supernatural powers. His obsession with the occult went beyond mere fasc
